author: Brent Rossow
releaseNotes: Bug fixes and modernization of Sebastian YEPES' original driver: fixed undefined variable in firmware version reporting, corrected state-check schedule hour labels, fixed SwitchBinaryReport and Hail handlers that were silently dropped, changed param80 default to Basic Report so the hub receives immediate state-change notifications, removed spurious powerlevelGet() calls from poll and checkState, and modernized on/off to use SwitchBinary commands.
